name: Map
description: Interactive geographic map powered by MapLibre GL — markers, polylines, polygons, circles, arcs, heatmaps, legend overlays, and popups; CARTO vector basemaps, no API key required.

api.name: Map
api.description: Interactive geographic map powered by MapLibre GL — markers, polylines, polygons, circles, arcs, heatmaps, legend overlays, and popups; CARTO vector basemaps, no API key required.

parameters.name: TileLayer
parameters.description: Accepts a CARTO style preset (Positron, DarkMatter, Voyager), a legacy raster name (OpenStreetMap, CartoLight, CartoDark, Satellite, Terrain) — kept as aliases pointing at the closest GL vector style — or a raw MapLibre style.json URL. Auto (the default) picks Positron or DarkMatter based on the host page's theme, matching mapcn.dev.

parameters.name: Layers
parameters.description: When set, renders a chip-style switcher in the top-right that lets the user pick between presets (or custom { name, url } records).

parameters.name: Cluster
parameters.description: Marker clustering via leaflet.markercluster. CDN-loaded on first use; falls back to plain markers if the script fails to fetch.

parameters.name: Geolocate
parameters.description: Adds a "My location" button that geolocates the user.

parameters.name: Fullscreen
parameters.description: Adds a fullscreen toggle button.

parameters.name: Scale
parameters.description: Adds a metric scale bar in the bottom-left corner.

parameters.name: Search
parameters.description: Adds a Nominatim-backed search bar in the top-left.

parameters.name: Projection
parameters.description: MapLibre projection name. "mercator" (default flat web-map) or "globe" for a 3-D spherical view. The globe becomes visible at zoom levels roughly 0–3; it blends back to mercator above zoom 4.

parameters.name: AutoFitBounds
parameters.description: When true the map automatically fits its viewport to include all registered markers and shapes after the first render.

parameters.name: Overlay
parameters.description: Optional content rendered as an absolutely-positioned overlay inside the map container (z-index 10, pointer-events none on the wrapper so map interaction is not blocked). Use absolute-position classes on your own child element to place chips, legends, or status badges (e.g. class="absolute bottom-2 right-2 pointer-events-auto …").

records.name: MapContext
records.description: Cascading context passed to MapMarker + shape children so they can register themselves with the parent Map.

parameters.name: Curvature
parameters.description: How tall the arc rises above the straight chord, as a fraction of the chord's length. 0 = straight line, 1 = a full semicircle-ish bulge. Defaults to 0.25.

parameters.name: DashArray
parameters.description: SVG dash pattern. Defaults to "5 6" (arcs are dashed by default).

parameters.name: Dashed
parameters.description: Set to false to draw the arc as a solid line instead of the default dashed style. Has no effect when DashArray is set explicitly.

parameters.name: HoverColor
parameters.description: Stroke color on hover. Null = no hover highlight.

parameters.name: HoverWeight
parameters.description: Stroke width on hover. Null = same as Weight.

parameters.name: Animate
parameters.description: Animate the arc drawing on first render (line draws from start to end over ~1 s).

parameters.name: Center
parameters.description: Circle center as (lat, lon).

parameters.name: RadiusMeters
parameters.description: Radius in meters. Leaflet draws the circle in real-world units, so its pixel size grows/shrinks with zoom.

parameters.name: Points
parameters.type: IEnumerable<(double Lat, double Lon, double Intensity)>
parameters.description: Collection of heat points. Each tuple is (lat, lon, intensity) where intensity should be in the range 0–1 (defaults to 1 when not meaningful). Pass a bare (lat, lon) list via a helper or use the convenience constructor that sets intensity to 1.

parameters.name: Radius
parameters.description: Radius of each point in pixels at full zoom. Defaults to 20.

parameters.name: Opacity
parameters.description: Opacity of the heatmap layer (0–1). Defaults to 0.8.

parameters.name: ColorRamp
parameters.description: Color ramp expressed as a MapLibre interpolation stops list. Format: alternating stop (0–1) and CSS color values. Example: new object[] { 0, "transparent", 0.4, "blue", 0.8, "red", 1, "orange" }. Defaults to a blue → cyan → yellow → orange → red ramp.

parameters.name: Title
parameters.description: Optional title shown above the legend items.

parameters.name: Position
parameters.description: Absolute-position corner shorthand. Defaults to "bottom-left". Values: "top-left", "top-right", "bottom-left", "bottom-right". Can also pass a raw Tailwind class via Class.

parameters.name: Color
parameters.description: Dot color. Friendly names ("red", "green", etc.) or any CSS color value.

parameters.name: Label
parameters.description: Label text shown next to the dot.

parameters.name: IconUrl
parameters.description: Bitmap icon URL. When set, takes precedence over Variant — we hand Leaflet a plain L.icon and skip the DivIcon path entirely. Anchored bottom-center at 32×32, matching the pre-3.1 default.

parameters.name: Variant
parameters.description: Visual variant for the auto-generated DivIcon. Ignored when IconUrl is set. Defaults to "Default" (filled circle). Valid values: "Default", "Outline", "Pin", "Dot".

parameters.name: Color
parameters.description: Override the marker's theme color. Accepts a friendly name ("red", "green", "yellow", …) or a raw CSS color ("#ff0000", "hsl(...)"). Null = theme primary.

parameters.name: Highlighted
parameters.description: Marks this marker as "highlighted" (e.g. a recommendation). The pin itself is unchanged, but with Cluster on, any cluster bubble that contains at least one highlighted marker is tinted with the cluster-highlight color (the --lumeo-map-cluster-highlight CSS variable, default amber) — so a recommendation stays discoverable even while its marker is clustered away.

parameters.name: Label
parameters.description: Permanent label rendered above the marker. Use for waypoints or numbered tours. Different from Title (hover tooltip).

parameters.name: LabelHoverOnly
parameters.description: When true, the Label is hidden by default and only appears on hover. Useful for dense maps where always-on labels create visual noise. Default is false (label always visible).

parameters.name: Icon
parameters.description: Optional inline content inside the marker circle — a single letter, a number, or a small <Blazicon> SVG. The fragment is rendered to a hidden host and its innerHTML is spliced into the DivIcon. Ignored when IconUrl is set.

parameters.name: Popup
parameters.description: Optional rich popup body. When present, it overrides the plain Title as the marker's popup content. The fragment renders into a hidden host div and Leaflet uses the host's innerHTML.

parameters.name: Draggable
parameters.description: Allow the user to drag the marker to a new position.

parameters.name: OnDragEnd
parameters.description: Fires with the new (lat, lon) after the user finishes dragging the marker. Use with two-way binding or to update your own state. Only fires when Draggable is true.

events.name: OnDragEnd
events.description: Fires with the new (lat, lon) after the user finishes dragging the marker. Use with two-way binding or to update your own state. Only fires when Draggable is true.

parameters.name: Points
parameters.description: Ordered list of (lat, lon) points forming the polygon ring. The first and last points are connected automatically.

parameters.name: Points
parameters.description: Ordered list of (lat, lon) points the polyline visits.

parameters.name: Color
parameters.description: Stroke color. Friendly name ("red", "blue", …) or a raw CSS color. Null = theme primary.

parameters.name: Weight
parameters.description: Stroke width in pixels.

parameters.name: Opacity
parameters.description: Stroke opacity, 0..1.

parameters.name: DashArray
parameters.description: SVG dash pattern (e.g. "6 4" for dashed). Null = solid.

parameters.name: Dashed
parameters.description: Convenience toggle — renders a standard "6 4" dash when true. Ignored when DashArray is set explicitly.

parameters.name: HoverColor
parameters.description: Stroke color on hover. Null = no hover highlight.

parameters.name: HoverWeight
parameters.description: Stroke width on hover. Null = same as Weight.

parameters.name: Animate
parameters.description: Animate the line drawing on first render (draws from start to end over ~1 s).

parameters.name: Tooltip
parameters.description: Optional hover tooltip text.

parameters.name: PopupHtml
parameters.description: Optional popup HTML (rendered on click).

parameters.name: Lat
parameters.description: Latitude of the popup anchor point.

parameters.name: Lon
parameters.description: Longitude of the popup anchor point.

parameters.name: IsOpen
parameters.description: Whether the popup is currently visible.

parameters.name: CloseButton
parameters.description: Show a close (×) button inside the popup.

parameters.name: CloseOnClick
parameters.description: Close the popup when the user clicks the map background.

parameters.name: Html
parameters.description: HTML string for the popup body. Overrides ChildContent.

parameters.name: ChildContent
parameters.description: Blazor render fragment for rich popup body. Rendered into a hidden host element; JS reads the innerHTML to open the MapLibre popup.

slots.name: Overlay
slots.description: Optional content rendered as an absolutely-positioned overlay inside the map container (z-index 10, pointer-events none on the wrapper so map interaction is not blocked). Use absolute-position classes on your own child element to place chips, legends, or status badges (e.g. class="absolute bottom-2 right-2 pointer-events-auto …").

slots.name: Icon
slots.description: Optional inline content inside the marker circle — a single letter, a number, or a small <Blazicon> SVG. The fragment is rendered to a hidden host and its innerHTML is spliced into the DivIcon. Ignored when IconUrl is set.

slots.name: Popup
slots.description: Optional rich popup body. When present, it overrides the plain Title as the marker's popup content. The fragment renders into a hidden host div and Leaflet uses the host's innerHTML.

slots.name: ChildContent
slots.description: Blazor render fragment for rich popup body. Rendered into a hidden host element; JS reads the innerHTML to open the MapLibre popup.

mdSummary:
# Map

Interactive geographic map powered by MapLibre GL — markers, polylines, polygons, circles, arcs, heatmaps, legend overlays, and popups; CARTO vector basemaps, no API key required.

**Package:** `Lumeo.Maps` · **Category:** Data Display
**Docs:** https://lumeo.nativ.sh/components/map

## Parameters
| Owner | Name | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| Map | Center | `(double Lat, double Lon)` | `(51.0, 10.4)` |  |
| Map | CenterChanged | `EventCallback<(double Lat, double Lon)>` | `` |  |
| Map | Zoom | `int` | `5` |  |
| Map | ZoomChanged | `EventCallback<int>` | `` |  |
| Map | Height | `string` | `"400px"` |  |
| Map | TileLayer | `string` | `"Auto"` | Accepts a CARTO style preset (Positron, DarkMatter, Voyager), a legacy raster name (OpenStreetMap, CartoLight, CartoDark, Satellite, Terrain) — kept as aliases pointing at the closest GL vector style — or a raw MapLibre style.json URL. Auto (the default) picks Positron or DarkMatter based on the host page's theme, matching mapcn.dev. |
| Map | Layers | `string[]?` | `` | When set, renders a chip-style switcher in the top-right that lets the user pick between presets (or custom { name, url } records). |
| Map | ZoomControl | `bool` | `true` |  |
| Map | Attribution | `bool` | `true` |  |
| Map | ScrollWheelZoom | `bool` | `true` |  |
| Map | Cluster | `bool` | `` | Marker clustering via leaflet.markercluster. CDN-loaded on first use; falls back to plain markers if the script fails to fetch. |
| Map | Geolocate | `bool` | `` | Adds a "My location" button that geolocates the user. |
| Map | Fullscreen | `bool` | `` | Adds a fullscreen toggle button. |
| Map | Scale | `bool` | `` | Adds a metric scale bar in the bottom-left corner. |
| Map | Search | `bool` | `` | Adds a Nominatim-backed search bar in the top-left. |
| Map | Projection | `string` | `"mercator"` | MapLibre projection name. "mercator" (default flat web-map) or "globe" for a 3-D spherical view. The globe becomes visible at zoom levels roughly 0–3; it blends back to mercator above zoom 4. |
| Map | AutoFitBounds | `bool` | `` | When true the map automatically fits its viewport to include all registered markers and shapes after the first render. |
| Map | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| Map | Overlay | `RenderFragment?` | `` | Optional content rendered as an absolutely-positioned overlay inside the map container (z-index 10, pointer-events none on the wrapper so map interaction is not blocked). Use absolute-position classes on your own child element to place chips, legends, or status badges (e.g. class="absolute bottom-2 right-2 pointer-events-auto …"). |
| Map | OnClick | `EventCallback<(double Lat, double Lon)>` | `` |  |
| Map | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| Map | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |
| MapArc | From | `(double Lat, double Lon)` | `` |  |
| MapArc | To | `(double Lat, double Lon)` | `` |  |
| MapArc | Curvature | `double` | `0.25` | How tall the arc rises above the straight chord, as a fraction of the chord's length. 0 = straight line, 1 = a full semicircle-ish bulge. Defaults to 0.25. |
| MapArc | Color | `string?` | `` |  |
| MapArc | Weight | `double` | `2.5` |  |
| MapArc | Opacity | `double` | `0.9` |  |
| MapArc | DashArray | `string?` | `"5 6"` | SVG dash pattern. Defaults to "5 6" (arcs are dashed by default). |
| MapArc | Dashed | `bool` | `true` | Set to false to draw the arc as a solid line instead of the default dashed style. Has no effect when DashArray is set explicitly. |
| MapArc | HoverColor | `string?` | `` | Stroke color on hover. Null = no hover highlight. |
| MapArc | HoverWeight | `double?` | `` | Stroke width on hover. Null = same as Weight. |
| MapArc | Animate | `bool` | `` | Animate the arc drawing on first render (line draws from start to end over ~1 s). |
| MapArc | Tooltip | `string?` | `` |  |
| MapArc | PopupHtml | `string?` | `` |  |

| MapCircle | RadiusMeters | `double` | `100` | Radius in meters. Leaflet draws the circle in real-world units, so its pixel size grows/shrinks with zoom. |
| MapCircle | Color | `string?` | `` |  |
| MapCircle | FillColor | `string?` | `` |  |

| MapHeatmap | Points | `IEnumerable<(double Lat, double Lon, double Intensity)>` | `[]` | Collection of heat points. Each tuple is (lat, lon, intensity) where intensity should be in the range 0–1 (defaults to 1 when not meaningful). Pass a bare (lat, lon) list via a helper or use the convenience constructor that sets intensity to 1. |
| MapHeatmap | Radius | `int` | `20` | Radius of each point in pixels at full zoom. Defaults to 20. |
| MapHeatmap | Opacity | `double` | `0.8` | Opacity of the heatmap layer (0–1). Defaults to 0.8. |
| MapHeatmap | ColorRamp | `object[]?` | `` | Color ramp expressed as a MapLibre interpolation stops list. Format: alternating stop (0–1) and CSS color values. Example: new object[] { 0, "transparent", 0.4, "blue", 0.8, "red", 1, "orange" }. Defaults to a blue → cyan → yellow → orange → red ramp. |
| MapHeatmap | MapCtx | `Map.MapContext?` | `` |  |
| MapLegend | Title | `string?` | `` | Optional title shown above the legend items. |
| MapLegend | Position | `string` | `"bottom-left"` | Absolute-position corner shorthand. Defaults to "bottom-left". Values: "top-left", "top-right", "bottom-left", "bottom-right". Can also pass a raw Tailwind class via Class. |
| MapLegend | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| MapLegend | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| MapLegend | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |
| MapLegendItem | Color | `string?` | `` | Dot color. Friendly names ("red", "green", etc.) or any CSS color value. |
| MapLegendItem | Label | `string?` | `` | Label text shown next to the dot. |
| MapLegendItem | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| MapLegendItem | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |
| MapMarker | Lat | `double` | `` |  |
| MapMarker | Lon | `double` | `` |  |
| MapMarker | Title | `string?` | `` |  |
| MapMarker | IconUrl | `string?` | `` | Bitmap icon URL. When set, takes precedence over Variant — we hand Leaflet a plain L.icon and skip the DivIcon path entirely. Anchored bottom-center at 32×32, matching the pre-3.1 default. |
| MapMarker | Variant | `string` | `"Default"` | Visual variant for the auto-generated DivIcon. Ignored when IconUrl is set. Defaults to "Default" (filled circle). Valid values: "Default", "Outline", "Pin", "Dot". |
| MapMarker | Color | `string?` | `` | Override the marker's theme color. Accepts a friendly name ("red", "green", "yellow", …) or a raw CSS color ("#ff0000", "hsl(...)"). Null = theme primary. |
| MapMarker | Highlighted | `bool` | `` | Marks this marker as "highlighted" (e.g. a recommendation). The pin itself is unchanged, but with Cluster on, any cluster bubble that contains at least one highlighted marker is tinted with the cluster-highlight color (the --lumeo-map-cluster-highlight CSS variable, default amber) — so a recommendation stays discoverable even while its marker is clustered away. |
| MapMarker | Label | `string?` | `` | Permanent label rendered above the marker. Use for waypoints or numbered tours. Different from Title (hover tooltip). |
| MapMarker | LabelHoverOnly | `bool` | `` | When true, the Label is hidden by default and only appears on hover. Useful for dense maps where always-on labels create visual noise. Default is false (label always visible). |
| MapMarker | Icon | `RenderFragment?` | `` | Optional inline content inside the marker circle — a single letter, a number, or a small <Blazicon> SVG. The fragment is rendered to a hidden host and its innerHTML is spliced into the DivIcon. Ignored when IconUrl is set. |
| MapMarker | Popup | `RenderFragment?` | `` | Optional rich popup body. When present, it overrides the plain Title as the marker's popup content. The fragment renders into a hidden host div and Leaflet uses the host's innerHTML. |
| MapMarker | OnClick | `EventCallback` | `` |  |
| MapMarker | Draggable | `bool` | `` | Allow the user to drag the marker to a new position. |
| MapMarker | OnDragEnd | `EventCallback<(double Lat, double Lon)>` | `` | Fires with the new (lat, lon) after the user finishes dragging the marker. Use with two-way binding or to update your own state. Only fires when Draggable is true. |
| MapMarker | MapCtx | `Map.MapContext?` | `` |  |
| MapPolygon | Points | `IEnumerable<(double Lat, double Lon)>` | `Array.Empty<(double, double)>()` | Ordered list of (lat, lon) points forming the polygon ring. The first and last points are connected automatically. |
| MapPolygon | Color | `string?` | `` |  |
| MapPolygon | FillColor | `string?` | `` |  |
| MapPolygon | Weight | `double` | `2` |  |
| MapPolygon | Opacity | `double` | `0.9` |  |
| MapPolygon | FillOpacity | `double` | `0.2` |  |
| MapPolygon | Tooltip | `string?` | `` |  |
| MapPolygon | PopupHtml | `string?` | `` |  |
| MapPolygon | MapCtx | `Map.MapContext?` | `` |  |
| MapPolyline | Points | `IEnumerable<(double Lat, double Lon)>` | `Array.Empty<(double, double)>()` | Ordered list of (lat, lon) points the polyline visits. |
| MapPolyline | Color | `string?` | `` | Stroke color. Friendly name ("red", "blue", …) or a raw CSS color. Null = theme primary. |
| MapPolyline | Weight | `double` | `3` | Stroke width in pixels. |
| MapPolyline | Opacity | `double` | `0.9` | Stroke opacity, 0..1. |
| MapPolyline | DashArray | `string?` | `` | SVG dash pattern (e.g. "6 4" for dashed). Null = solid. |
| MapPolyline | Dashed | `bool` | `` | Convenience toggle — renders a standard "6 4" dash when true. Ignored when DashArray is set explicitly. |
| MapPolyline | HoverColor | `string?` | `` | Stroke color on hover. Null = no hover highlight. |
| MapPolyline | HoverWeight | `double?` | `` | Stroke width on hover. Null = same as Weight. |
| MapPolyline | Animate | `bool` | `` | Animate the line drawing on first render (draws from start to end over ~1 s). |
| MapPolyline | Tooltip | `string?` | `` | Optional hover tooltip text. |
| MapPolyline | PopupHtml | `string?` | `` | Optional popup HTML (rendered on click). |
| MapPolyline | MapCtx | `Map.MapContext?` | `` |  |
| MapPopup | Lat | `double` | `` | Latitude of the popup anchor point. |
| MapPopup | Lon | `double` | `` | Longitude of the popup anchor point. |
| MapPopup | IsOpen | `bool` | `` | Whether the popup is currently visible. |
| MapPopup | IsOpenChanged | `EventCallback<bool>` | `` |  |
| MapPopup | CloseButton | `bool` | `true` | Show a close (×) button inside the popup. |
| MapPopup | CloseOnClick | `bool` | `true` | Close the popup when the user clicks the map background. |
| MapPopup | Html | `string?` | `` | HTML string for the popup body. Overrides ChildContent. |
| MapPopup | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` | Blazor render fragment for rich popup body. Rendered into a hidden host element; JS reads the innerHTML to open the MapLibre popup. |
| MapPopup | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| MapPopup | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |
| MapPopup | MapCtx | `Map.MapContext?` | `` |  |

## Slots
- `ChildContent` (Map) — RenderFragment slot
- `Overlay` (Map) — Optional content rendered as an absolutely-positioned overlay inside the map container (z-index 10, pointer-events none on the wrapper so map interaction is not blocked). Use absolute-position classes on your own child element to place chips, legends, or status badges (e.g. class="absolute bottom-2 right-2 pointer-events-auto …").
- `ChildContent` (MapLegend) — RenderFragment slot
- `Icon` (MapMarker) — Optional inline content inside the marker circle — a single letter, a number, or a small <Blazicon> SVG. The fragment is rendered to a hidden host and its innerHTML is spliced into the DivIcon. Ignored when IconUrl is set.
- `Popup` (MapMarker) — Optional rich popup body. When present, it overrides the plain Title as the marker's popup content. The fragment renders into a hidden host div and Leaflet uses the host's innerHTML.
- `ChildContent` (MapPopup) — Blazor render fragment for rich popup body. Rendered into a hidden host element; JS reads the innerHTML to open the MapLibre popup.

## Events
- `CenterChanged` (`EventCallback<(double Lat, double Lon)>`)
- `ZoomChanged` (`EventCallback<int>`)
- `OnClick` (`EventCallback<(double Lat, double Lon)>`)

## Sub-components
- `MapArc`, `MapCircle`, `MapHeatmap`, `MapLegend`, `MapLegendItem`, `MapMarker`, `MapPolygon`, `MapPolyline`, `MapPopup`

## Cascading values it expects
- `MapCtx` (`Map.MapContext?`)

## Services it injects
- (none)

## Keyboard
—

## Example
```razor
<Map />
```

## CSS variables
`--color-background`, `--color-border`, `--color-foreground`, `--color-muted`, `--color-muted-foreground`, `--radius`

## Files
- `UI/Map/Map.razor`
- `UI/Map/MapArc.razor`
- `UI/Map/MapCircle.razor`
- `UI/Map/MapHeatmap.razor`
- `UI/Map/MapLegend.razor`
- `UI/Map/MapLegendItem.razor`
- `UI/Map/MapMarker.razor`
- `UI/Map/MapPolygon.razor`
- `UI/Map/MapPolyline.razor`
- `UI/Map/MapPopup.razor`
- `UI/Map/MapShape.cs`
